lines.lyric: I’ll say it again, lovin’ you
lines.lyric_hangul: I'll say it again, lovin' you
lines.lyric_translation: I’ll say it again, lovin’ you

lines.lyric: Eoneu sunganedo Yeh yeh oh ah
lines.lyric_hangul: 어느 순간에도, yeah, yeah, oh, ah
lines.lyric_translation: At any moment yeh yeh oh ah

lines.lyric_hangul: 섬세한 너의 move, 예민해지는 내 맘도
lines.lyric_translation: Your subtle move / My sensitive heart

lines.lyric: Pureunsaege sup geu ane pieonaneun chum
lines.lyric_hangul: 푸른색의 숲, 그 안에 피어나는 춤
lines.lyric_translation: A dance blooming in a green forest

lines.lyric: Neoneun naye mam naneun neoye mam
lines.lyric_hangul: 너는 나의 맘, 나는 너의 맘
lines.lyric_translation: You read my mind and I read your mind

lines.lyric_hangul: 다 알고 있는 motion, 마음껏 표현하면
lines.lyric_translation: We read each other’s motion / Let it loose

lines.lyric: Oh A yayaya Oh A yayaya
lines.lyric_translation: Oh a yayaya Oh a yayaya

lines.lyric: Neoreul gyesok algo shipeo Oh ah
lines.lyric_hangul: 너를 계속 알고 싶어, oh, ah
lines.lyric_translation: I want to know you more oh ah
Adilla kia akia syurapoe
Cast a spell in a language only we know
Adilla kia akia syurapoe
Cast a spell in a language only we know

lines.lyric_hangul: 깊어지는 서로의 바닷속에, 그저 잠들고 싶어
lines.lyric_translation: Into each other’s deepening oceans / We just want to drift to sleep

lines.lyric_hangul: 일렁이는 파도 같은 맘, 말 안 해도 알 수 있어 난
lines.lyric_translation: A heart like a tidal wave / You don’t have to tell me

parts.lyric: Mal an haedo al su isseo nan

lines.lyric_hangul: 눈빛 안에서 움직여봐, 서두르지 말고 keep that vibe
lines.lyric_translation: Move within my eyes / No need to rush, keep that vibe

lines.lyric_hangul: 우리만의 숨결이 채워가며 써 내려가는 melody
lines.lyric_translation: Only our breaths / Fill and write the melody
